tawa in all circumstances Tonight Tonight Ramadan will begin inshallah Ramadan Mubarak my dear brothers and sisters may Allah accept our our Deeds inshallah let's take advantage of these remaining hours to prepare ourself mentally and spiritually resolve any pending arguments forget forgive others so Allah will forgive you and start Ramadan with a clean slate remember the essence of Ramadan is launching path for a permanent change towards a better IM and practice in these blessed days increase your Dua for yourself and the umah our word is in desperate need for mercy of Allah there are heart to give and pay to give and pray for them we are a one body as Muslims oh Allah the most merciful we thank you for the gift of Ramadan we have not worshiped you as you deserve but you but your deeds and keep laziness and distractions away from us help us remember you and recite your book abundantly make the Quran the spring of our hearts Ya Allah forgive us forgive our sins the major and sisters it's very important for me to share with you some of the announcements today so please take a note of some of these because it's very important for us to to start the Ramadan and with the great blessings but the same time we also have to take care of some matters with the neighbors inshallah so first inshallah there's going to be a change in timings for the for the prayers starting tomorrow morning the fud prayers prayer will be at 6:00 a.m. and the ass will be at 5:00 p.m. so basically we're going to have a special schedule throughout the Ramadan so please make sure that you are aware of these timings fud is going to be 6: a.m. will be 5:00 p.m. that's the AMA times and Isa is going to be 8:00 p.m. inshallah we definitely we have we need your help in making sure that we are able to fulfill the afar calendar that's posted back there if you cannot you know there's a 2,000 for the weekday and 3,000 for the weekend so if you want to split it with somebody else please put your name up there and put partial or P next to it and leave your number so we'll coordinate that inshallah this is the most important announcement I want to make today so I was just waiting to to get to this it is the neighbors are going to be having their own set of activities as you know that we have been using their parking lot for our activities and we have been they have been very generous with us this week they have their own convention so I'm going to request every one of you personally to please help us there's something else all also happening they have been doing some repairs to their parking lot so of course that is nearing completion but their convention starts it's actually it's Thursday Friday Friday and Thursday Friday and Saturday so it is 700 p.m. every night so we need to make sure our vehicles are not in their parking lot or in the way so we cannot just say just because it's vacant or I can see a lot of space I can go park please do not do that we'll have our people to to help you coordinate the traffic at least for our activities we have a lot of parking spaces in the you know the neighbors have a parking spots in their backyard so we can use that also there's a parking along the street and the parking in the at the end of this this this street that there's a ample parking so I think inshallah we'll be able to manage all the the traffic today but we need your cooperation and look for the direction that people are providing you and be kind to your neighbors inshallah we will be also doing some fundraising during the month of Ramadan and will the Tavis inshallah and there is there's one other announcement there's a science project there is announcement going to be who the winners are so if you have time to just go by in the gymnasium and you'll you'll be able to participate in that again please contact me or brother jabber for anybody who wants to donate or participate in theam Alik sh.

summary: This is a Jummah (Friday) sermon delivered on the eve of Ramadan at the Muslim Community Center of Tucson. The speaker emphasizes the spiritual significance of Ramadan as a month of mercy, forgiveness, and divine blessing. The sermon covers the virtues of fasting, the importance of the Quran during this month, and examples from the Prophet Muhammad and his companions demonstrating their devotion. The speaker provides five practical tips for maximizing spiritual benefit: sincere repentance, clear intentions and goals, protecting oneself from sins, engaging with the Quran, and maintaining moderation. The sermon concludes with extensive supplications for the community and announcements regarding prayer timings and parking arrangements during the upcoming month.
suggested_title: Jummah Sermon: Preparing for Ramadan - Spiritual Guidance and Community Announcements
